fields.remarks:
<format type="text/markdown"><![CDATA[
## Remarks

`SKFontVariationAxis` is a struct that describes a single variation axis of an OpenType variable font. Each axis has a four-character tag, a minimum, default, and maximum value, and an optional flag indicating whether the axis should be hidden from user interfaces.

Use <xref:SkiaSharp.SKTypeface.VariationDesignParameters> to retrieve all axes, or <xref:SkiaSharp.SKTypeface.GetVariationDesignParameters(System.Span{SkiaSharp.SKFontVariationAxis})> for a span-based overload.

## Examples

```csharp
using var typeface = SKTypeface.FromFile("Roboto-Variable.ttf");
var axes = typeface.VariationDesignParameters;

foreach (var axis in axes)
{
    Console.WriteLine($"Tag: {axis.Tag}, Min: {axis.Min}, Default: {axis.Default}, Max: {axis.Max}, Hidden: {axis.IsHidden}");
}
```
]]></format>
fields.summary: Describes a single variation axis of an OpenType variable font.
